Elite_Plan_Features: Permanent showcase slot • Unlimited display time • Advanced priority
Pro_Business_Plan_Features: One showcase slot × 50 hours/week • Buy extra hours when needed
account_banned: Your account has been banned from creating invitations.
account_deletion_intro: You can request permanent deletion of your DineBuddies account at any time. This page explains what is removed and how to proceed.
account_deletion_irreversible: Account deletion is permanent and cannot be undone.
account_long_banned: Your account has been banned from creating invitations for an extended period.
account_responsibility: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account information.
account_restricted: Your account has been restricted from creating invitations.
account_type_business_desc: A business profile for your venue on DineBuddies — not for personal use.
account_type_personal_desc: Invitations, friends, and community. Sign in with Google or Facebook — this is not a business listing.
accurate_info: Registered information must be accurate and correct.
add_first_item: Add your first menu item above
add_images_above: Add images using the buttons above
age_groups_restricted: Sorry, this invitation is for age groups: {{allowed}}
already_business: Your account is already a business! 🎉
already_completed: This invitation has already been completed
already_free_plan: You are already on the free plan!
already_reviewed: You have already reviewed this business
arrived_too_far: You must be near the restaurant (within 100-200 meters) to send "I've arrived".
ban_duration: You can create invitations again in {{days}} days.
be_first_to_create: Be the first to create an invitation and start connecting!
biz_plan_checkout_missing: Paid plan is not configured. Please contact support.
biz_plan_free_banner_desc: Core profile and community. Motion limits apply; AI uses Dine Credits.
biz_plan_paid_banner_suffix: /month — full manual feature set. Buy Dine Credits for AI.
block_grace_banner: This person is blocked. You can keep viewing this page; the shorter blocked screen will appear the next time you open their profile.
block_user_confirm: Block this user? You will no longer see their profile, posts, or invitations.
blocked_users_desc: Blocked users cannot interact with you the same way, and you will not see their profile, posts, or invitations. You can unblock someone anytime.
booking_cancelled_message: A booking for "{{title}}" at your venue has been cancelled. Reason: {{reason}}
booking_confirmed_message: A booking for "{{title}}" at your venue is now confirmed with {{count}} guests.
buy_credits_lead: Pay once — no subscription. Choose a pack below.
camera_error_generic: Could not open the camera. Check permissions and try again.
camera_error_permission: Camera access was blocked. Allow camera (and microphone if asked) in your browser or site settings, then try again.
camera_tab_hint: Take a photo or record a video with your camera. To pick an image file from your gallery, use Upload photo.
can_edit_time_date: You can edit the time and date
cancel_invitation_confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this invitation?
cancellation_count: Total cancellations in the last 90 days: {{count}}
cancellation_warning: Warning: Please be mindful of your commitments in the future.
cannot_create_restricted: You cannot create invitations. Your account is restricted until {{date}}.
cannot_reduce_below_accepted: Cannot reduce guest count below {{count}} (already accepted)
cannot_remove_age_group: Cannot remove a previously selected age group. You can only add more.
cannot_remove_gender_group: Cannot remove a previously selected group. You can only add more.
card_overlay_desc_placeholder: Write a thoughtful message to appear here, aligned within the safe zones…
change_password_desc: Update your password to keep your account secure
chat_before_meetup: Chat with members before the meetup
chat_closed_24h: Chat closed - 24 hours have passed since the invitation time
chat_messaging_restricted: Messaging is not available with this user.
chat_on_way: 🚗 {{name}} is on their way to the restaurant!
choose_how_to_add_photo: Choose how to add your photo:
choose_how_to_add_video: Choose how to add your video:
city_auto_detected: City (detected from your location — you can only register in this city)
city_from_google_only: Only cities that exist on Google Maps can be selected.
claim_business_phone_hint: Verify the business phone via SMS to transfer ownership to your account.
clipboard_error: Cannot read clipboard. Please paste manually.
code_backup_desc: Create restore points for your codebase and revert changes instantly.
complete_profile_desc: Please provide a few details to get the best experience.
confirm_complete_invitation: Are you sure you want to complete this invitation?
confirm_delete_all_private: Are you sure you want to delete all your private invitations?
confirm_delete_image: Are you sure you want to delete this image?
confirm_delete_invitation: Are you sure you want to delete this invitation?
confirm_logout: Are you sure you want to logout?
consumer_no_plans: Your Dine Credits pay for private invites, date invites, AI, and boosts — one balance (free + paid; free is used first). Partners use the same credit model from their wallet. Final per-use prices may be tuned later.
content_unsafe: Sorry, the file content is inappropriate and violates community guidelines.
conversion_error: An error occurred during conversion. Please try again.
cover_upload_failed: Cover image upload failed. Try again.
create_account_enjoy: Create an account to enjoy all features
create_account_promo: Create an account to enjoy all features
create_final_preview_hint: Same size as cards in the home feed (not scaled down). Review here, then publish below.
create_section_ai_cover_hint: After choosing a venue, add optional notes for Gemini. Generation sends vibe as tone, venue type as scene, then this text as context.
create_section_ai_gateway_hint: Full pack: Gemini proposes title, message, theme, font, motion, and a text-free hero with a clear center area for overlays.
create_section_geo_search_note: Use DineBuddies venues or Google Places; city and country context refine suggestions.
create_section_venue_location_hint: Pick a place and venue category — this drives the hero background; vibe above drives tone and copy.
create_section_vibe_hint: Sets tone for AI cover, text, and motion — separate from venue category below.
credit_hint_free: Free credits: up to 20, +10 refreshed each month.
credit_hint_paid: Paid credits never expire. Free pool is used first.
credit_hint_rate: 1 credit ≈ $0.01 USD when you buy packs.
credit_hint_uses: Same balance for private invites, dates & AI.
credits_pricing_page_subtitle: Dine Credits are shared by all accounts: private invites, date invites, AI, and more. Buy packs in your wallet — final per-use pricing may be announced later.
credits_wallet_subtitle: One balance for invites, dates & AI
data_security_text: We use modern encryption technologies to protect your data. However, no security system is 100% secure.
delete_account_error: An error occurred while deleting the account. For security reasons, please log in again and try.
delete_account_warning: Warning! This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account?
delete_from_settings: You are signed in. To permanently delete your account, go to Settings and use the "Delete Account" option. You will be asked to confirm before the deletion is processed.
delete_need_login: You need to be signed in to delete your account. Sign in, then go to Settings and use "Delete Account".
deletion_backups: Deleted accounts may remain in backups for a limited period in accordance with our Privacy Policy.
deletion_contact_intro: If you cannot access your account or need help with deletion, contact us and we will process your request in line with our policies.
deletion_invitations: Your dining invitations and related content
delivery_links_edit_hint: Paste any delivery link, then tap Fetch to detect the service name and icon. Up to {{max}} links.
delivery_links_empty_owner: Add delivery links so customers can order from your profile.
delivery_links_upgrade: Upgrade to Pro to unlock delivery links
desktop_landing_hero_subtitle: The social dining app for meeting people and sharing meals. Connect with food lovers, discover amazing restaurants, and create unforgettable memories over great food.
dine_credits_dating_insufficient: Publishing a date invitation costs ${DATING_INVITATION_PUBLISH_CREDITS} Dine Credits. Add credits in your wallet (Settings → Dine Credits).
dine_credits_private_banner: {{balance}} Dine Credits — publishing uses {{cost}} credits (free pool is used first).
dine_credits_private_insufficient: Publishing a private invitation costs ${PRIVATE_INVITATION_PUBLISH_CREDITS} Dine Credits. Add credits in your wallet (Settings → Dine Credits).
dine_credits_use_hint: Used for private & date invites, AI, and boosts. Free pool is used first.
dine_credits_wallet_card_body: Buy credit packs in one place. The same balance covers private invitations, date invitations, AI tools, and other in-app features.
discover_offers: Discover latest offers and events from all partners
draft_modal_description: Don't worry, we've safely saved everything you did as a draft so your work isn't lost. Take your time, and once you join as a partner your new look will be published instantly for your customers!
draft_modal_title: Your profile is starting to look amazing! ✨
email_updated_success: Email updated successfully! Verification email sent.
email_verification_note: You will receive a verification email at your new address. Please verify it to complete the change.
enable_push_desc: Get instant updates for new messages, invitations, and bookings.
engagement_tooltip: Likes and comments on your community posts
enjoy_features: Now you can enjoy all premium features!

feedback_desc: Have a complaint or suggestion? Contact the management directly and privately.
feedback_empty_desc: You haven't received any new open complaints or suggestions.

feedback_ph_suggestion: Share your idea to improve the place...
feedback_req_phone: Please enter a phone number to contact you

feedback_resolved_error: An error occurred, please try again later.
feedback_success: Your message has been sent successfully. We will contact you soon.
fill_all_fields_photo: Please fill all fields, including your profile photo.
flexible_plans: Flexible plans with competitive prices for all needs
follow_people_first: Follow people first to invite them
followers_only_desc: Only people you follow will see this on the main map
following_disabled_desc: Let other users follow your profile. When off, no one can follow you (existing followers are unaffected).
for_unregistered_venues: For venues not yet on DineBuddies
form_image_placeholder: Drag image here or click to select
form_message_placeholder: Write your message to invitees here...
friends_only_desc: Only your friends can see your profile
gemini_occasion_brief_hint: This text is the main “step C” context. If you leave it empty, the model still uses your vibe and venue type.
gemini_occasion_brief_placeholder: Who should join, occasion, or any detail — sent as the host context line to the model.
get_elite_features_promo: Get a full month of Elite features
go_to_current_invitation: Do you want to go to your current invitation?
google_business_no_photos_hint: Search and select a venue first to see photos from its Google Business listing.
group_chat_description: Chat with all members in real-time
guest_count_updated_full: Guest count updated! Invitation is now complete. {{count}} participants notified.
guest_mode_desc: You're browsing as a guest. Sign in to access all settings and personalize your experience!

hope_to_see_you_next_time: Hope to see you next time.
image_downloaded: Image downloaded! You can now upload it to Instagram Story.
image_moderation_unavailable: We could not verify this image right now. Please try again in a moment.
image_rejected_policy: This image was rejected and was not sent. Please choose a different, appropriate photo.
improve_experience: To improve your app experience and personalize suggestions.
info_we_collect_text: We collect information you provide when registering (name, email, photo). We also collect location data to help find nearby venues and partners.
instagram_story_not_available: Instagram Story not available for this content yet.
install_ios_desc: Tap Share → Add to Home Screen
install_modal_ios_step1: Tap Share ↗️ in your browser bar.
install_modal_ios_step2: Tap “Add to Home Screen”, then Add.
install_modal_subtitle: Add to your home screen for faster loading and a smoother experience.
insufficient_credits_desc: You have no private invitation credits. Upgrade your plan or purchase additional credits.
insufficient_dine_credits_wallet: Not enough Dine Credits. Open Settings → Dine Credits to top up.
insufficient_private_credits: Sorry, you have used all your private invitation credits. Please upgrade to continue.
intellectual_property_text: All rights to design, logos, and content are owned by DineBuddies app and may not be copied or used without permission.
invalid_guest_count: Invalid guest count. Must be at least {{min}}
ios_push_desc: To receive notifications on iPhone, tap the Share icon below and select "Add to Home Screen".
ios_push_settings_hint: On iPhone, add DineBuddies to your Home Screen to enable push. You can still change email and quiet hours below.
join_to_chat: Once accepted, you'll be able to enter the group chat.
liability_limitation_text: The app provides a platform for individuals to communicate and coordinate meetings. We are not responsible for service or food quality at venues or individuals' actions outside the app.
like_failed: Could not update like. Try again.
local_dev_oauth_body: Google Cloud → Credentials → Web client → add these values (use the exact origin below — port may be 5176 or 5177):
local_dev_oauth_cursor_hint: Cursor preview: open login in Chrome if redirect fails —
local_dev_oauth_lan_blocked: Social sign-in does not work on the network IP address.
local_dev_oauth_lan_hint: You opened {{origin}}. Firebase only allows localhost for OAuth — not 192.168.x.x.
local_dev_oauth_summary: Local dev: OAuth setup (expand if sign-in fails)
local_dev_oauth_use_localhost: Always use the Local URL from Vite (localhost), not the Network IP (192.168.x.x).
localhost_preview_body: Run npm run dev and open this URL in your browser to see the live listing preview below. For Google Maps search on localhost, add your dev origin to the Maps API key: Application restrictions → HTTP referrers → {{origin}}/*
location_detection_failed: We could not detect your city. Please enable location access or try again.
location_helper_text: Tip: Search for the venue name (e.g. Starbucks).
location_no_results: No places found. Try another search.
location_not_determined: Your location could not be determined. Enable GPS/location access to create a public invitation.
location_permission_denied: We need location access to verify you're at the venue
manage_business: You can manage your business from the profile page
maps_key_missing_user_hint: Place search uses OpenStreetMap (Photon + Nominatim) and does not require a Google Maps API key.
maps_places_quota_hint: Google Places quota exceeded. Try again later or check usage and billing in Google Cloud Console.
maps_places_request_denied_hint: Google blocked place search (REQUEST_DENIED). In Google Cloud Console: enable the legacy Places API (not only Places API New) for this project, add your site under HTTP referrer restrictions on the key, and ensure billing is active. The in-app search uses the classic Maps JavaScript Places library.
maps_script_failed_user_hint: Google Maps could not load on this domain. In Google Cloud Console, add your live site URLs to the API key HTTP referrer list, and enable Maps JavaScript API plus the legacy Places API (and Geocoding API if you use city bounds).
media_ai_tab_hint: Generate a text-free hero plus title, message, and theme with Magic cover. We scroll you to the studio above.
media_dinebuddies_venue_cover_hint: Optional: use the cover image from the business profile you selected — not from map listings.
media_helper_text: Select a photo or video to be displayed on your invitation card
media_upload_failed: Failed to upload media. Try again.
media_video_limits: Video: max {{maxMb}} MB, up to {{maxSeconds}} seconds

member_notifications_locked: Member messaging is included in the paid business plan.

no_participants_affected: No participants were affected by this cancellation.

post_edit_denied: You can only edit your own posts.
post_failed: Failed to create post. Try again.
prevent_fraud: To prevent fraud and ensure platform security.
preview_reminder: Remember: Your invitation will only be visible to guests after you click 'Publish Invitation'
preview_unsaved_warning: Your invitation has not been published yet. Press 'Publish' to make it available to guests.
preview_warning: This is a preview of your invitation. It has NOT been published yet and is NOT visible to other users. Click 'Publish Invitation' below to make it available to guests.
preview_warning_private: This is a preview of your private invitation. Guests won't be notified until you click 'Send Invitations'.
privacy_settings_desc: Control who can see your information and interact with you
public_invitation_desc: Visible to everyone on the home feed. Anyone can request to join.
public_invitation_guests_hint: Public invitations appear in the feed; guests tap join on the card after you publish.
public_invite_must_be_local: Sorry, public invitations are restricted to your current local area (within a 30 km radius).
publish_permission_denied: Publishing failed: your account does not have permission to update this invitation.
push_config_error: Push is not configured on this build. Contact support.
push_diagnostics_desc: If you aren't receiving notifications, use this tool to debug your device's connection.
push_enable_failed: Please allow notifications in your browser settings.
push_enabled_success: Push notifications enabled for this device.
push_finish_register_desc: Notifications are allowed but this device is not registered yet. Tap below to complete setup.
push_ios_already_allowed: This iPhone already allows notifications. Turn on the switch below to register this device.

push_permission_denied_ios: Notifications are blocked. iPhone Settings → Notifications → DineBuddies → Allow.

push_sw_not_ready: Almost ready — the app will refresh once, then tap Register again.

rankings_elite_only: Only Elite subscribers are included in the ranking.
rankings_no_in_scope: No businesses in this area. Try Global.
rankings_paid_only: Only Paid Business subscribers are included in the ranking.

req_mix_chars: Mix of letters and numbers recommended

save_then_share: Save then share on WhatsApp / Instagram

security_confirm_deletion: For your security, please enter your password to confirm account deletion.

sharing_info_text: We do not sell your personal data to any third party. We may share some general data (without identity) with partners to improve services.
show_email_desc: Display your email on your profile
show_location_desc: Display your location on your profile
sign_out_failed: Could not sign out. Try again.
something_went_wrong: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again
start_conversation_first: Be the first to start the conversation
story_interaction_hint_private: Your reply is private between you and the story owner

story_owner_privacy_note: Only you can see these replies

stripe_test_mode_banner: Stripe test mode — use card 4242 4242 4242 4242. No real charges.
suggest_messages_failed: Could not load suggestions. Try again in a moment.
suggest_messages_internal: The AI suggestion service failed (often a Gemini API key, quota, or model issue on the server). Try again later or write the message yourself.
suggest_messages_invalid_context: Add a title and location so we can suggest a message.

suspend_account: Management reserves the right to suspend any account that violates ethical standards.
terms_agreement: By continuing, you agree to our Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy
terms_intro_text: Welcome to DineBuddies app. By using this app, you agree to comply with these terms and conditions. If you do not agree with any part of them, you may not use the app.
time_change_confirm:
⚠️ Important Notice:

This will:
1. Change the time from {{oldDate}} {{oldTime}} to {{newDate}} {{newTime}}
2. Send notification to all participants ({{count}} people)
3. Change their status from "Accepted" to "Pending"

Are you sure?
time_change_notification: The time for "{{title}}" has been changed from {{oldDate}} {{oldTime}} to {{newDate}} {{newTime}}. Please confirm your attendance again.
time_change_success:
✅ Time changed successfully!

Notifications sent to {{count}} participants.
time_change_warning: ⚠️ The organizer changed the time. Does the new time work for you?

user_blocked_stay_on_page_toast: User blocked. You can stay on this page until you leave.

user_muted_toast: You will not receive private or dating invitations or messages from this user.
